params.name: Mummy of Ramesses
params.description:
On Oct 5, 1213 BC, the most famous mummy in history was placed into the pyramid.
Ramses, pharaoh during the 19th Dynasty of Egypt, was regarded as the greatest pharaoh of ancient Egypt. After he passed away at the age of ninety, Egyptian high priests and artisans mummified his body and sent it to the pyramid for permanent burial. However, three thousand years later, he still suffered from the disturbance from the outside world. Some archaeologists found the Pharaoh's tomb by following the tra …
